analysis_title: Aura Emission Handlers Reverse Engineering Analysis

handlers.name: EmitAuraHandler
handlers.description: Event handler that emits aura effects to allied entities. Registers for entity spawn events and applies ChangePropertyAura-based skills to allies within range.

OnMissionStarted.purpose: Registers OnEntitySpawned callback with TacticalManager, iterates existing actors to apply aura

OnMissionFinished.purpose: Cleanup - unregisters OnEntitySpawned callback from TacticalManager

OnEntitySpawned.purpose: Callback for new entity spawns - checks alliance, creates skill from template, applies to ally

fields.name: skill
fields.description: Reference to owning skill instance (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

fields.name: effectData
fields.description: Reference to EmitAura effect data containing configuration

effect_data_fields.name: auraSkillTemplate
effect_data_fields.description: Template for the ChangePropertyAura skill applied to allies

effect_data_fields.name: onlyOnce
effect_data_fields.description: Flag indicating if aura should only be applied once per entity

handlers.name: ChangePropertyAuraHandler
handlers.description: Event handler that applies property modifications to entities within aura range. Supports both additive and multiplicative properties with optional linear distance falloff.

OnUpdate.purpose: Core aura logic - iterates PropertyChange array, applies property modifications based on distance

IsEnabled.purpose: Checks if origin entity valid and target within range

ValidateOrigin.purpose: Validates origin entity reference, auto-removes skill if origin invalid

fields.name: skill
fields.description: Reference to owning skill instance (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

fields.name: effectData
fields.description: Reference to ChangePropertyAura effect data containing configuration

fields.name: originEntity
fields.description: Reference to the entity emitting the aura (set by EmitAuraHandler closure)

effect_data_fields.name: propertyChanges
effect_data_fields.description: Array of property modifications to apply. Each entry is 12 bytes.

effect_data_fields.name: range
effect_data_fields.description: Maximum tile distance for aura effect (default: 5)

effect_data_fields.name: linearFalloff
effect_data_fields.description: If true, property values scale linearly with distance: value * (1 - distance/range)

PropertyChange.description: Single property modification entry in aura effect

fields.name: propertyType
fields.description: Enum value identifying which property to modify

fields.name: additiveValue
fields.description: Value to add for additive properties

fields.name: multiplicativeValue
fields.description: Multiplier for multiplicative properties (1.0 = no change)

EntityPropertyType.description: Enum classifying properties as additive or multiplicative

key_discoveries.title: Two-Handler Aura Architecture
key_discoveries.description: Auras use a two-handler pattern: EmitAuraHandler manages aura emission and ally detection, while ChangePropertyAuraHandler handles actual property modifications on affected entities.

key_discoveries.title: Dynamic Ally Detection
key_discoveries.description: EmitAuraHandler hooks into TacticalManager.OnEntitySpawned to detect new allies during mission, and iterates existing actors on mission start. Uses IsAlliedWith for faction checking.

key_discoveries.title: Origin Entity Tracking
key_discoveries.description: ChangePropertyAuraHandler stores origin entity at offset 0x20, set via closure callback. Used for range calculations via GetDistanceTo. Handler auto-removes if origin dies (checks entity+0x48 alive flag).

key_discoveries.title: Linear Falloff Support
key_discoveries.description: When effect+0x64 flag is set, property values scale with distance: effectiveValue = baseValue * (1 - distance/maxRange). Provides gradual aura strength reduction.

key_discoveries.title: Property Type Classification
key_discoveries.description: PropertyTypeExtensions.IsMultProperty determines if UpdateProperty (additive) or UpdateMultProperty (multiplicative) is called. Multiplicative properties use AddMult formula: value=(mult-1.0)+current.

key_discoveries.title: Skill Creation Flow
key_discoveries.description: EmitAuraHandler creates skill instance from SkillTemplate at effect+0x58, then uses ForEachEventHandlerOfType<ChangePropertyAuraHandler> to set origin on all handlers before adding to target's SkillContainer.

key_discoveries.title: Default Range Value
key_discoveries.description: ChangePropertyAura constructor sets default range of 5 tiles at offset 0x60. This is tile-based distance calculated via Entity.GetDistanceTo.

key_discoveries.title: PropertyChange Array Structure
key_discoveries.description: PropertyChange entries at effect+0x58 are 12 bytes each with layout: [uint PropertyType][int AdditiveValue][float MultValue]. Array iteration uses 0xC stride with count at array+0x18.

relationships.EmitAura_to_ChangePropertyAura: EmitAura effect data contains SkillTemplate (offset 0x58) that references a skill using ChangePropertyAura effects
relationships.Handler_to_EffectData: Both handlers store effect data reference at offset 0x18, set during Create factory method
relationships.Handler_to_Skill: Both handlers inherit skill reference at offset 0x10 from SkillEventHandler base class
relationships.ChangePropertyAuraHandler_to_Origin: Origin entity stored at offset 0x20, set by EmitAuraHandler's OnEntitySpawned closure
